_documentation: See README.md `Configuration` section for the full schema. The active provider for each LLM block is selected by its `provider` field; sibling keys prefixed with `_` are documentation-only and ignored by the loader.

connectors._web_search_provider_options: tavily | serpapi (functionally interchangeable for the Web Agent)
connectors._optional_keys: All keys below are optional; the connector either works without them (free tier) or accepts the key for higher quota. Leave empty to skip.

entry_extraction._doc: OCR M_ocr step. Image-to-text is performed by the local DeepSeek-OCR vLLM bundle; the Bedrock branch only exists for already-extracted text-block segmentation and is rarely used.

ocr_vlm_extract._doc: Parser Agent (cropped-block VLM reparse). Set `provider` to one of: bedrock | openai | azure_openai. The block below carries credentials for whichever provider is active.

verification_llm._doc: Matcher Agent + Class-Specialist Judgers. Same provider menu as ocr_vlm_extract: bedrock | openai | azure_openai. The two blocks are independent — you can mix providers across stages.
